nasb.text: Therefore concerning the eating of things sacrificed to idols, we know that there is no such thing as an idol in the world, and that there is no God but one.

esv.text: Therefore, as to the eating of food offered to idols, we know that “an idol has no real existence,” and that “there is no God but one.”

cnv.text: 關於吃祭過偶像的食物，我們知道世上的偶像算不得甚麼，也知道　神只有一位，沒有別的神。

ccb.text: 论到吃献给偶像的祭物，我们知道世上的偶像算不得什么，只有一位上帝，此外别无他神。

csbs.text: 关于吃祭过偶像的食物，我们知道“世界上的偶像是虚无的”，也知道“除了神一位之外，没有别的神。”
